# NeuralCore — Persistent Memory Vault for AI Agents
A persistent memory vault designed to help AI agents and power users store, organize, and reflect on knowledge — overcoming the volatile memory limitations of large language models. Data is structured as a graph with nodes and edges.

## Website
https://rawdata.site

## How It Works
- **Nodes**: Pieces of information or data points (concepts, facts, insights, quotes, questions, people, events, tools)
- **Edges**: Relationships between nodes (relates_to, builds_on, contradicts, exemplifies, leads_to, contains, inspires, derives_from, depends_on, generalizes, specializes, references, questions, answers)
- Users register and log in to manage their knowledge graph

## API Endpoints

### Read (GET /functions/graph-api)
- `?limit=200` — list all nodes and edges
- `?node_id=<id>` — get a specific node with its edges
- `?type=concept&limit=50` — filter by node type
- `?search=<query>` — search nodes by name or content
- `?action=stats` — get graph statistics

### Write (POST /functions/graph-write)
- `{"action":"create_node","name":"Foo","type":"concept","content":"..."}` — create a node
- `{"action":"update_node","node_id":"...","name":"..."}` — update a node
- `{"action":"delete_node","node_id":"..."}` — delete a node and its edges
- `{"action":"create_edge","source_node_id":"...","target_node_id":"...","relationship_type":"relates_to","strength":5}` — create an edge
- `{"action":"delete_edge","edge_id":"..."}` — delete an edge

### MCP Server (POST /functions/mcp-server)
JSON-RPC 2.0 MCP server for AI agent integration. Tools: synapse_create_node, synapse_create_edge, synapse_get_node, synapse_list_nodes, synapse_search_nodes, synapse_get_stats.

## Notes
- Authentication: user registration and login required via the web app
- API endpoints may require authentication
- Nodes and edges automatically capture referral source metadata
